summary: Website with an opening page saying "My beautiful Wifeyyy", followed by multiple romantic slides, ending with an interactive mini-game where the user draws a 2D shape that is converted into a 3D figure.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Romantic abstract background with soft warm gradients and subtle bokeh lights (romantic-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Delicate line-art heart and floral motif, transparent background (heart-floral-motif.dim_1024x1024.png)
- Small set of minimal romantic UI icons (arrow/next/prev) in a cohesive style, transparent background (romantic-icons.dim_512x512.png)

existing_features.title: Create an opening/landing slide that prominently displays the exact title text: "My beautiful Wifeyyy".
Implement a multi-slide experience (carousel/story-style) after the opening slide, with multiple slides containing romantic and beautiful lines in English.
Add a final slide that contains a mini-game: the user draws a 2D shape, and the app converts it into a corresponding 3D figure rendered on the page.

Apply a cohesive, romantic visual theme across all slides (colors, typography, spacing, backgrounds, and transitions) with a distinct style that is consistent throughout the site (avoid blue/purple as the primary palette).
Add the required generated images as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the UI as background/decoration consistent with the romantic theme.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create opening page with title text "My beautiful Wifeyyy"
Add multiple romantic slideshow sections with beautiful lines/text
Add final-slide game: user draws a 2D shape and it transforms into a 3D figure

projectName: Romantic multi-slide website with opening message and 2D-to-3D drawing game
